feed.title: ApolloniusSun
feed.subtitle: 分配律不过是左伴随保持余极限罢了。

entry.title: Index Page
entry.content:
Notes

Mostly displayed in pdf version.

Commutative Algebra

Reference Book: Atiyah - Introduction to Commutative Algebra.

Part Markdown (Abandoned) PDF(Recommended)
Part 1. Chapter 1~3. Part 1 PDF version
Part 2. Chapter 4~5. Part 2 PDF version
Part 3. Chapter 6~8. Abandoned PDF version
Part 4. Chapter 9~11. Abandoned PDF version

Real Analysis

Reference Book: Royden Real Analysis 4th edition.

Incompleted Version

Complex Geometry

Main Reference Book: Principles of Algebraic Geometry (Griffiths&Harris)

Incompleted Version

Progress: Part 0 completed.

Lecture Notes - 2023 Spring

Analysis 0H : Gu ChenLin. Sketch Version

Algebra 0H : Qiu Yu. Sketch Version

Algebraic Number Theory : Duan ZheFan. Sketch Version

Small Essays

A quick review of Baby Rudin Chapter 7: Function Series

A summary of basic geometry I've learned.

(Originally intended to be written as notes for Baby Rudin Chapter 10; Caution: May contain factual errors since the author knew nothing about algebraic topology when writing this essay. )

More Topics Coming Soon.

Plan:

a. Fields and Galois Theory. (Based on GTM167, however this will probably be moved to notes section)

b. Linear Algebra Techniques.

c. Non-mathematics stuff.

Resources

E-book download

Other Links

Social Platform Accounts: Bilibili, Zhihu, NeteaseMusic
